title: To Divide or Not To Divide

content.problemStatement:
Alice likes all the numbers which are divisible by AAA. Bob does **not** like the numbers which are divisible by BBB and likes all the remaining numbers. Determine the smallest number **greater than or equal to** NNN which is liked by both Alice and Bob. Output −1-1−1 if no such number exists.


Input Format

The first line contains a single integer TTT — the number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
The first and only line of each test case contains three space-separated integers AAA, BBB and NNN — the parameters mentioned in the problem statment.


Output Format
For each test case, output the smallest number ≥\ge≥ NNN which is divisible by AAA and is **not** divisible by BBB. Output −1-1−1 if no such number exists.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: 151515 is the smallest number ≥\ge≥ 111111 which is divisible by 555 and is not divisible by 222.
Test case 222: 282828 is the smallest number ≥\ge≥ 242424 which is divisible by 444 and is not divisible by 333.
Test case 333: There does not exist any number which is divisible by A=7A = 7A=7 and is not divisible by B=7B = 7B=7.
